chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3314 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.02.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chanhio, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** Counsel for the petitioner is unable to proceed with the matter. This matter pertains to the year 2016 and is pending since last about nine years without any useful progress. Even otherwise the jurisdiction of this Court, as to the relief(s) sought by the petitioners, is barred by Section 11 of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act 1975. Hence the petition is not maintainable and stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
